slides.title: Boolean Inputs ☑️
slides.content:
# Checkbox, Radio, Switch

* `Checkbox` – for multiple selections (true/false).
* `Radio` – for mutually exclusive options in a group.
* `Switch` – on/off toggle with material design.

All require a value and an onChanged callback to update state.

quizData.question: Which widget is best for selecting one option from a set?
quizData.explanation: Radio buttons are designed for mutually exclusive choices.

slides.title: Checkbox, Radio, Switch Example
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use ListTile for better UX

Wrap Checkbox, Radio, or Switch in a `ListTile` to provide a label and improve touch target.
